title: Getting Started
content:
You begin your journey in Thornwall Village, a small frontier settlement. Here's what to do first:

  • Explore — Click ⚔ Explore in the story panel to find enemies and events
  • Fight — Defeat enemies to earn XP, gold, and loot
  • Level up — XP fills your bar; leveling increases your HP, MP, and stats
  • Buy gear — Visit the shop (🏪 Market) to upgrade your equipment
  • Rest — Stay at the inn to restore HP and MP
  • Travel — Use the nav panel to move between connected locations
  • Store items — Visit Home in Thornwall to store items, craft, and use the Forge

First goal: Reach level 3-4 and clear the Dark Hollow dungeon. Explore Whispering Woods and King's Road to level up safely first.

title: Combat
content:
Combat is turn-based. Each turn you choose one action:

  • ⚔ Attack — Basic attack using your weapon. Free, no cooldown.
  • ✨ Ability — Use a class ability. Costs MP, may have cooldowns.
  • 🛡 Defend — Halve incoming damage this turn. Builds +2 momentum. Costs nothing.
  • 🧪 Use Item — Use a consumable (health potion, etc.) from your inventory.
  • 🏃 Flee — Attempt to escape. Success chance scales with DEX. Not available in arena.

Key mechanics:

  • Crits — Based on CHA stat. Deal 1.5× damage.
  • Dodge — Based on DEX stat. Avoid enemy attacks entirely.
  • Defense — Reduces damage by DEF/(DEF+50) percentage.
  • Telegraphs — Enemies warn before powerful attacks. Defend or prepare when you see ⚠ warnings!
  • Status effects — Burn, poison, freeze, stun, slow. Applied by abilities and enemy attacks.
  • Death — Respawn at Thornwall, lose 10% gold. All combat progress is lost.

title: Momentum
content:
Momentum is a combat gauge (0-10) that rewards sustained tactical play.

How it builds:

  • Attack or use damage ability: +1
  • Defend: +2
  • Dodge an enemy attack: +1
  • Land a critical hit: +1 bonus

How it drops:

  • Take damage: -1
  • Take a critical hit: -2
  • Flee: reset to 0

Threshold bonuses:

  • 3 — Warmed Up: +5% damage
  • 5 — In The Zone: +10% damage, +5% crit chance
  • 7 — Battle Focus: +15% damage, +10% crit, -10% MP costs
  • 9 — Unstoppable: +25% damage, +15% crit, -25% MP costs

Defending is powerful — it reduces damage AND builds momentum faster than attacking.

title: Ability Ranks
content:
Every ability can be upgraded from Rank 1 to Rank 5 at the Arcane Academy in Sunspire.

Upgrade costs (Arcane Tokens):

  • Rank 1 → 2: 5✦
  • Rank 2 → 3: 10✦
  • Rank 3 → 4: 18✦
  • Rank 4 → 5: 30✦
  • Total to max one ability: 63✦

Higher ranks increase damage and healing. Rank 3 and Rank 5 unlock bonus effects like bonus crit chance, cleansing debuffs on heals, increased buff duration, and more.

Strategy: Focus on upgrading your 2-3 most-used abilities first before spreading tokens across all abilities.

title: Combo System
content:
Certain ability sequences trigger combo bonuses — extra damage, guaranteed crits, or special effects.

How combos work:

  • Use a specific ability, then follow it with another specific ability on the next turn
  • If the sequence matches a combo, the second ability gets a powerful bonus
  • A ⚡ COMBO message appears in the combat log when triggered

Discovery:

  • Each class has 3 combos to discover
  • Combos are hidden until you trigger them naturally
  • Discovered combos appear in the Combos section of the Codex
  • Experiment with different ability sequences to find them all!

Hint: Think about which abilities set up opportunities for other abilities. A stun followed by a power attack, a buff followed by a finisher...

title: Classes
content:
Five classes, each with a unique playstyle:

  • ⚔ Warrior (STR) — Melee tank. Highest HP, physical damage, self-healing, and armor buffs. Excels in sustained fights.
  • 🔮 Mage (INT) — Spell caster. Highest MP, powerful AoE magic, crowd control (freeze, burn). Glass cannon — high damage, lower HP.
  • 🗡 Rogue (DEX) — Stealth DPS. Critical hits, poisons, evasion, and burst damage. Fast kills but fragile.
  • ✨ Cleric (WIS) — Healer/support. Healing, shields, cleansing, and holy damage. Best survivability through sustain.
  • 🏹 Ranger (DEX/WIS) — Ranged hybrid. Traps, companion pet, nature magic. Versatile with strong pet synergy.

Each class has 5 starter abilities plus 20+ learnable abilities at the Academy. Max 6 active abilities at a time.

title: Equipment & Gear
content:
9 equipment slots: Weapon, Shield, Body, Helmet, Gloves, Boots, Amulet, Ring, Trinket

Rarity tiers:

  • Common — Basic stats, cheap
  • Uncommon — Better stats
  • Rare — Random perks, 1 gem socket
  • Epic — Strong perks, 2 gem sockets
  • Legendary — Powerful perks, 3 sockets. Drop-only.
  • Mythic — Best in slot, 4 sockets, class-specific. Boss drops only.

Durability: Gear degrades in combat. Repair at shops. If durability hits 0, the item breaks and is destroyed.

Perks: Random bonuses on rare+ gear — bonus stats, lifesteal, crit chance, HP regen, and more.

title: The Forge
content:
The Forge is in your Home at Thornwall. It works on equipped rare+ gear.

💎 Socketing:

  • Insert gems into socket slots for percentage-based bonuses
  • Socket slots by rarity: Rare=1, Epic=2, Legendary=3, Mythic=4
  • 6 gem types: Ruby (ATK%), Sapphire (DEF%), Emerald (HP Regen%), Amethyst (MP Regen%), Topaz (Crit%), Opal (Dodge%)
  • 3 gem tiers: Chipped → Cut → Flawless (better bonuses)
  • Gems can be extracted (costs gold)

✨ Enchanting:

  • Roll new random perks on rare+ gear
  • Costs gold + materials
  • Replaces existing perks

🔮 Perk Crystals:

  • Extract perks from gear into a tradeable crystal (75% success, 25% item destroyed)
  • Apply crystals to other gear to transfer perks

title: Crafting
content:
Craft items at Home in Thornwall.

How it works:

  • You need a recipe + the required materials
  • Materials drop from enemies during exploration and combat
  • Recipes are discovered from boss kills, exploration events, and quest rewards
  • Check the recipe book in your Home crafting tab to see what you can make

What you can craft: Consumables (potions, food), equipment, and materials for the Forge.

Tips:

  • Explore different zones — each has unique material drops
  • Boss enemies have a chance to drop rare recipe scrolls
  • You can craft multiple items at once if you have enough materials

title: Adventurer's Guild
content:
Join the Adventurer's Guild for 500 gold (one-time fee) at any town.

Bounties:

  • 3 bounties per town per day (easy, medium, hard)
  • Accept a bounty → kill the required enemies → claim your reward
  • Rewards: Guild XP, Guild Marks, gold, XP
  • Bounties refresh at midnight

Guild Ranks: Initiate → Bronze → Silver → Gold → Platinum → Champion. Rank up by earning Guild XP from bounties.

Guild Vendor: Sells exclusive gear for Guild Marks. Higher ranks unlock better items.

title: Arcane Academy
content:
The Academy is in Sunspire Citadel.

Learn Abilities: Spend Arcane Tokens (✦) to learn new class abilities. Tokens are earned from boss kills (1-3 per boss).

Upgrade Ranks: Upgrade your abilities from Rank 1-5 for increased power and bonus effects. See the Ability Ranks guide for costs.

Ability Loadout:

  • Max 6 active abilities at a time
  • Swap abilities freely at the Academy
  • Separate PvE and PvP loadouts
  • PvP loadout defaults to your PvE loadout until customized

Strategy: Don't learn everything at once. Focus on abilities that complement your playstyle and upgrade those first.

title: Arena — The Crucible
content:
Wave survival mode available at any town.

Rules:

  • Fight waves of increasingly difficult enemies
  • No fleeing, no consumables — abilities and basic attacks only
  • HP and MP carry between waves
  • Fight until you die or leave

Between waves, choose one:

  • ❤ Heal 30% HP
  • 💧 Restore 30% MP
  • ⚡ +50% AP bonus next wave

Arena Points (AP): Earned per wave cleared. Scales with wave number. Spend at the Arena Store for exclusive gear.

Boss waves: Every 5th wave. Gems drop from boss waves 30+.

Arena Store: 6 slots by rarity. Per-slot reroll available. One free reroll per day.

title: Exploration & Events
content:
Wild zones (Whispering Woods, King's Road, Crossroads, Shadowfen) and dungeons (Dark Hollow, Ruined Shrine, Ember Mines, Witch's Tower, Dragon Peak) have combat encounters.

Exploration events: ~22% chance to get a non-combat event instead of a fight. Types include NPCs, shrines, puzzles, merchants, and environmental encounters.

Stat checks: Events use D&D-style checks — roll d20 + your stat modifier vs a difficulty (DC). Higher stats = better odds.

Dungeons:

  • Multiple rooms + boss at the end
  • HP/MP carry between rooms
  • Each dungeon has a unique mechanic: darkness, cursed ground, cave-ins, arcane disruption, scorching heat
  • 10% chance of hidden bonus rooms with extra loot

title: Progression Tips
content:
Leveling path:

  • Lv 1-3: Whispering Woods, King's Road. Do Thornwall quests. Buy uncommon gear.
  • Lv 3-4: Clear Dark Hollow dungeon. Move to Crossroads and Shadowfen.
  • Lv 4-5: Clear Ruined Shrine. Start Shadowfen quests.
  • Lv 5-7: Ember Mines and Witch's Tower. Join the Guild. Start bounties.
  • Lv 7-10: Dragon Peak. Visit Sunspire Academy. Learn and upgrade abilities.
  • Endgame: Arena for AP and gems. Max ability ranks. Collect mythic gear.

If you're stuck:

  • Upgrade your weapon first — it has the biggest impact on damage
  • Craft health potions for tough fights
  • Use Defend to build momentum before unleashing abilities
  • Try different ability combos for bonus damage
  • Grind bounties for guild marks and buy guild vendor gear

title: Currencies
content:
Four currencies, each earned and spent differently:

  • 💰 Gold — Earned from combat, quests, selling items. Spent at shops, repairs, inn, crafting, Forge, Guild registration.
  • ⚔ Guild Marks — Earned from bounty board rewards. Spent at the Guild Vendor for exclusive gear.
  • ✦ Arcane Tokens — Earned from boss kills (1-3 per boss). Spent at the Academy to learn abilities and upgrade ranks.
  • 🏟 Arena Points — Earned from arena wave survival. Spent at the Arena Store for arena-exclusive gear and rerolls.

Tips:

  • Gold is the most versatile — repair gear regularly to avoid breakage
  • Arcane Tokens are rare and valuable — prioritize upgrading your best abilities
  • Guild Marks come from daily bounties — do them consistently
  • Arena Points scale with wave — pushing deeper is more efficient

title: Raid Tower
content:
🕳 The Raid Tower

The Raid Tower at Sunspire Citadel contains multi-floor raids — the most challenging content in the game. Raids require a party of 2-5 players and feature unique enemies, lore-driven choices, and powerful exclusive loot.

How Raids Work

  • Party Required: Form a party at Sunspire using the Friends List. All members must be at Sunspire and ready.
  • Locked In: Once you enter, there is no retreat between floors. No fleeing, no consumables. Fight through or fall.
  • Floor Structure: Each floor has combat encounters, choice events (voted on by party), a pre-boss recovery, and a boss fight.
  • Choice Events: The party votes on decisions. Success grants buffs; failure causes damage and debuffs that carry into the next combat.
  • Pre-Boss Recovery: Before each boss, every player independently chooses to restore 25% HP, 25% MP, or 15% of both.
  • Death: If you fall, you're "down" until combat ends (auto-revive at 25% HP). A Cleric can resurrect mid-combat. If ALL players fall, the raid fails.

Loot

  • Boss Drops: Raid-exclusive legendary and mythic gear (25-30% chance per player, personal loot)
  • Exotic Drops: The final boss can drop class-locked Exotic items — the rarest gear in the game (18% chance per living player). Exotic items have 5 socket slots and the strongest stats.
  • Gold/XP/Tokens: Distributed per floor and on completion.

Available Raids

The Depths of Ashenmaw (Easy, 3 floors, Level 5+) — Beneath the ruins of Ashenmaw Keep, a corruption festers. Features undead enemies, the Hollow King boss, and the Vestiges of the Wellspring exotic set.

title: Party & Friends
content:
👥 Party & Friends

Friends List

Click the 👥 button in the navigation panel to open your Friends List. You can:

  • Add friends by typing their character name
  • Accept or decline incoming requests
  • See who's online (green dot) and where they are
  • Invite online friends at Sunspire directly to your raid party

Forming a Party

  1. Travel to Sunspire Citadel
  2. Open the Raid Tower and click Create Raid Party
  3. Invite friends using the + Invite Friend button (they must be at Sunspire)
  4. Wait for all members to click Ready
  5. The leader selects a raid and clicks Start Raid

Party Combat

In party combat, all players submit their action simultaneously each round. You have 30 seconds to choose — if time runs out, you auto-defend. Actions resolve in DEX order (fastest players act first), then allies (pets), then enemies.

Party Support Abilities

Each class has special abilities designed for party play:

  • Warrior: Rallying Defense (party DEF buff), Taunt (absorb enemy attacks)
  • Mage: Arcane Shield (party DEF+INT), Mana Font (restore ally MP)
  • Rogue: Smoke Screen (party dodge), Expose Weakness (enemy takes +20% damage)
  • Cleric: Heal Other, Mass Heal, Resurrect Ally (revive downed player)
  • Ranger: Hunter's Mark (+15% damage to target), Nature's Ward (party all-stats)

These abilities also work solo — party buffs apply to yourself, heal-other heals yourself, etc.
